verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
verse.verse_2: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
verse.verse_3: And He sent against them birds in flocks,
verse.verse_4: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
verse.verse_5: And He made them like eaten straw.
